title: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - VSA Control

blocks.text: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) System Structure Description - VSA Control

When the vehicle enters a state of oversteer, the VSA modulator control unit outputs a brake pressure signal optimally distributed to the outer front and rear wheels to generate a moment that inhibits oversteer and stabilizes the vehicle.

When the vehicle enters an understeer condition, the VSA modulator control unit outputs a brake pressure signal optimally distributed to the inside front and rear wheels to generate a moment to control the understeer.
When accelerating, a torque-down signal is output to the PGM-FI ECU to increase the cornering force of the drive wheels to secure turning performance and improve line tracing.
